name: BB:CategoryDefinition: Virtual Machine Started
notes: This Building Block defines virtual machine start events.
bb_references: BB:CategoryDefinition: Virtual Machine Started on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event category for the event is one of the following Audit.Virtual Machine Start Attempt, Audit.Virtual Machine Start Success
TD_list: APPLY BB:CategoryDefinition: Virtual Machine Started on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following Audit.Virtual Machine Start Attempt, Audit.Virtual Machine Start Success
